\documentclass[sigconf,authordraft]{acmart}

% Metadata
\title{{{title}}}
{{conference_latex}}
{{year_latex}}
{{doi_latex}}

{{#each authors}}
\author{{{name}}}
\affiliation{%
  \institution{{{affiliation}}}
  \country{{{country}}}
}
\email{{{email}}}

{{/each}}

\begin{document}
\begin{abstract}
{{abstract}}
\end{abstract}

{{#if keywords}}
\keywords{{{keywords_latex}}}
{{/if}}

\maketitle

{{body}}

\bibliography{ref}
\bibliographystyle{ACM-Reference-Format}
\end{document}
